title: Murders
summary: You’re an assassin, whether by trade, by inclination, or because it was that or be killed yourself. (Someone who Murders might have additional equipment, including three doses of a level 2 blade poison that inflicts 5 points of damage.)
gm_intrusions: Most people do not react well to a professional killer.
